overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through suburban Los Santos. The player travels along sidewalks past single-family homes, real estate signs, and palm trees, crossing streets and turning corners in a peaceful residential neighborhood under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with white fence and utility poles

events.description: passing blue mailbox on the left side of the sidewalk
dark sedan vehicle passes by on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk next to white wooden fence, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall white wooden privacy fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with power lines stretching along the street
tall palm trees visible across the street and along the road
large green and yellow real estate sign with 'WOLFS INTERNATIONAL REALTY' text
blue USPS mailbox on the sidewalk near the curb
black garbage bins lined up near the fence

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person walk along a suburban sidewalk bordered by a white wooden fence on the right. Utility poles and power lines run parallel to the street, with palm trees visible in the distance. The camera passes a blue mailbox and continues toward an intersection as a vehicle drives by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale residential street with stone retaining walls

events.description: crossing the asphalt road from one sidewalk to the other side
approaching and passing large green 'For Sale' sign in front yard

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering an upscale residential area with large houses and stone walls

entered.detail: low stone walls lining the front yards of large suburban properties
two-story suburban homes with well-manicured lawns and driveways

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street and enters a more affluent neighborhood characterized by stone retaining walls and larger suburban homes. The green real estate sign becomes prominent as the camera approaches, and the environment shifts from utility poles and fences to manicured lawns and residential architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with multiple real estate signs

events.description: passing red foreclosure sign indicating distressed property
turning right at the street corner onto a new sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past multiple real estate signs including a foreclosure sign, then turning onto a new street

entered.detail: red and white foreclosure sign with 'FORECLOSURE' text in front of a house
intersection of two residential streets with curb and sidewalk transition

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the residential neighborhood, the camera passes a red foreclosure sign and various real estate markers. The segment ends with a turn at a street corner, transitioning to a new street with different houses and landscaping.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street transitioning to commercial area with city views

events.description: distant city skyline becomes visible ahead between the houses

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk with tall hedge walls on left, approaching commercial district with visible skyline

entered.detail: tall green hedge walls lining the property boundaries
tall downtown buildings visible in the distance between suburban houses
large advertising billboard visible down the street
weathered wooden plank fence along the left side of sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along a sidewalk bordered by tall hedge walls and wooden fencing. The distant city skyline becomes visible ahead, indicating a transition from the residential neighborhood toward a more commercial urban area. A large billboard is visible in the distance as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a suburban neighborhood that gradually transitions from a modest residential street toward the distant urban skyline. It begins along a sidewalk bordered by a white wooden fence and utility poles, passing a blue mailbox as a vehicle drives by on the left. As the camera crosses the street, the environment shifts toward a more affluent area characterized by stone retaining walls, manicured lawns, and prominent green real estate signs. The movement continues past various foreclosure markers and residential architecture before turning a street corner to follow a path lined with tall hedge walls and wooden fencing. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a large billboard and the city skyline appearing on the horizon, signaling a move away from the suburbs toward a commercial district.
